sql_array: CREATE TABLE regions (id UInt32, name String, population UInt32, area Float32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO regions VALUES (1, 'RegionA', 500000, 1500.5), (2, 'RegionB', 800000, 3000.75), (3, 'RegionC', 750000, NULL), (4, 'RegionD', NULL, 2000.25);
SELECT regionToContinent((SELECT MAX(id) FROM regions WHERE population > 600000)), regionToName((SELECT id FROM regions WHERE area IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1), 'en') AS region_name FROM regions;
SELECT a.id, regionToContinent(a.id) AS continent_id, regionToName(constant_id, 'en') FROM (SELECT id AS constant_id FROM regions) AS a;
SELECT regionToContinent(a.id), a.name FROM (SELECT id, name FROM regions WHERE population IS NOT NULL) AS a WHERE regionToContinent(NULL) > 0;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT regionToContinent(id) AS continent, area FROM regions GROUP BY continent HAVING area < 2000);
SELECT regionToContinent(id) AS continent_id FROM (SELECT id, population FROM regions WHERE area > 1000) AS a WHERE id IN (1, 2, 3) LIMIT 5;
SELECT regionToContinent(regionToContinent(id)) FROM regions HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 GROUP BY id WITH TOTALS;
CREATE TABLE temp_regions AS regions; INSERT INTO temp_regions SELECT * FROM regions WHERE area IS NOT NULL;
SELECT regionToContinent(a.id) AS continent_id, regionToName(a.id, 'en') AS region_name FROM temp_regions a JOIN regions b ON a.id = b.id WHERE a.population < 700000;
